# Q10 arrayexpand explode tokens (composite field split)

**Dataset**: `gx_08_feed` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Split / parse composite delimited fields (split + arrayindex + to_number). Q10 arrayexpand explode tokens. `split()` carves the delimited field into an array, `arrayindex()` picks an element (negative index = from the end).

```sql
dataset = gx_08_feed | alter parts = split(combo, "|") | arrayexpand parts | fields combo, parts | sort asc combo
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 40). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
